g.text: Build and debug Python TUIs with Textual — widgets, reactive
attributes, TCSS layout, screens, and the test harness.
Use when the user mentions Textual, a TUI, App/Widget/Screen
subclasses, reactive attributes, TCSS, `textual run`, or compose().
Not for plain CLI parsing, Rich-only static output, or curses.
Markdown with Python + TCSS code blocks
AST4 (MEDIUM, accepted) — subprocess runs textual + pytest, scoped
